prestazioni: Cosworth-developed 3.9L V12 (engine code: GMA V12) with a custom titanium crankshaft and forged Mahle pistons, paired with a Garrett GT35R turbocharger (850hp target) and a bespoke Tremec 7-speed sequential transaxle with carbon-fiber driveshafts for reduced rotational mass

Full titanium exhaust system by Akrapovič with 4-into-1 headers, 3.5-inch diameter titanium piping, and a centrally mounted quad-exit diffuser (weight savings: 12kg vs. stock), tuned for a 9,000 RPM redline with a 300-cell catalytic converter for Euro 6 compliance

Ohlins TTX40 3-way adjustable coilovers with titanium springs (20% lighter than steel), custom valving for the T.50’s carbon monocoque, and a hydraulic ride-height adjustment system (10mm drop for track use) integrated with the car’s active aerodynamics
estetica: Full carbon-fiber widebody kit by Liberty Walk (LW-T50), featuring extended front fenders with integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling, a rear diffuser with active Gurney flap, and a 3D-printed titanium rear wing mount (replaces stock carbon wing for 5kg weight reduction)

Bespoke BBS FI-R wheels (20x11 front, 21x13 rear) in gold-anodized finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 front, 345/30 rear) with custom offset to clear the T.50’s inboard suspension and AP Racing 6-piston calipers

Custom livery by Driven Artwork, featuring a matte British Racing Green base with hand-painted gold leaf accents (inspired by the McLaren F1 GTR), a transparent engine cover with LED-backlit Cosworth logos, and a titanium fuel filler cap engraved with the owner’s initials
